note: Serializes ForbiddenTokenCheck.value (typed unknown) to a JSON string used as a substring match against the payload. No dedicated schema exists for this ad-hoc value; replacing with S.encodeUnknownEffect(S.UnknownFromJsonString) changes this from a pure synchronous expression to an Effect, so the surrounding tokenMatchesPayload predicate would need to become effectful. Human should decide whether to model a schema/keep a pure escape hatch.

suggestedTarget: S.UnknownFromJsonString + S.encodeUnknownEffect (or S.encodeEither for a legacy-config-snapshot schema)
note: Test fixture building a legacy config-snapshot JSON string written to disk to assert legacy reads. In scope per SPEC §2 (JSON ban applies to tests). No schema models this legacy-without-diff shape; human should decide whether to model a fixture schema or use S.encodeUnknownEffect(S.UnknownFromJsonString). Note the encode would need to run inside the surrounding Effect.fn generator.
